idea-plugin.name: IdeaVim
idea-plugin.description:
Bring the power of Vim to your JetBrains IDE.


IdeaVim is a Vim emulation plugin that lets you edit code using Vim's modal editing, motions, text objects, and commands — all while keeping full access to your IDE's refactoring, debugging, and navigation features.


What's included

  • Normal, Insert, Visual, Select, Command-line, and Ex modes
  • Motions, operators, text objects, marks, registers, and macros
  • Key mappings and Vim script support
  • Full Vim regex for search and replace
  • Configuration via ~/.ideavimrc (XDG paths supported)
  • Map any IDE action to a key with <Action>

Vim plugins

Enable popular Vim plugins like surround, commentary, easymotion, sneak, NERDTree, multiple-cursors, highlightedyank, which-key, and more — right from your ideavimrc.


Works everywhere

Compatible with IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, CLion, Rider, Android Studio, and all other JetBrains IDEs.


Resources:

  • GitHub — documentation, setup guides, and contributing
  • Issue tracker — feature requests and bug reports
